author: Bernard Gui (†1331)
title: De ordinatione officii missae facta a Domino Iesu Christo et sanctis eius Apostolis ac demum per summos romanos pontifices successive
editions: [P. Doussot, ‘Bernard Gui eveque de Lodeve…” 1899, 1:351-377 [Cambridge, CC MS 45, f. 67v][MSS on Mirabile]
remarks: Simple collection of canons, ala Liber Pontificalis. Perhaps written during his time at Avignon?
order_rank: Dominican convent of Limoges, student in 1280s in studia in S France, sublector and prior of various monasteries thereafter, Inquisitor of Toulouse (1307-1323), Procurator General for the Dominicans at Avignon (1316-1320), Bishop of Tui on 26 August 1323
